'''√h-t-m''' ('''kahatam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:debituminize|debituminize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-t-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:debituminize|debituminize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √h-t-m
|-
! Lemma
| kahatam
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thihatam || jihatam || shihatam || kihatam
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuhatam || jujuhatam || shushuhatam || kukuhatam
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuhatam || juhatam || shuhatam || kuhatam
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuhatam || juhatam || shuhatam || kuhatam
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thehatam || jehatam || shehatam || kehatam
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothohatam || jojohatam || shoshohatam || kokohatam
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thohatam || johatam || shohatam || kohatam
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thohatam || johatam || shohatam || kohatam
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || hatam || hatam || hatam || hatam
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || hatam || hatam || hatam || hatam
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || hatam || hatam || hatam || hatam
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || hatam || hatam || hatam || hatam
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæhatam || jæhatam || shæhatam || kæhatam
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathahatam || jajahatam || shashahatam || kakahatam
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thahatam || jahatam || shahatam || kahatam
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thahatam || jahatam || shahatam || kahatam
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shahatam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshahatam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishahatam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shahatamnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshahatamnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishahatamnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shahatamshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshahatamnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishahatamshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shahatamro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshahatamnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishahatamro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shahatammu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshahatamnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishahatammu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shahatamsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshahatamnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishahatamsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shahatamng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshahatamnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishahatamng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shahatamya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshahatamnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishahatamya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shahatamyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshahatamnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishahatamyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shahatamnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshahatamnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishahatamnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shahatamnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshahatamnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishahatamnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shahatamnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshahatamnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishahatamnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shahatamshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshahatamnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishahatamshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shahatamshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshahatamnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishahatamshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shahatamshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshahatamnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishahatamshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shahatamronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshahatamnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishahatamronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shahatamroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshahatamnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishahatamroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shahatamromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshahatamnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishahatamromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shahatammunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshahatamnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishahatammunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shahatammushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshahatamnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishahatammushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shahatammuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshahatamnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishahatammuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
